title: S + was/were + p.p.（過去被動）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 過去式 be 動詞 + 過去分詞
主詞 + 過去式 be 動詞 + 過去分詞 + 介詞 by + 動作執行者

explanation: 過去式被動語態用於表達過去某個時間點或時期內被執行的動作。單數主詞（I/he/she/it）搭配 was，複數主詞（we/they/you）搭配 were。過去分詞形式取決於動詞規則與否。by + agent 用於說明動作執行者，但非必須；若重點在於動作本身而非執行者，可省略。注意與過去簡單式主動語態的區別：被動強調受動者，主動強調動作者。

examples.eng: The letter was written by my grandfather last year.
examples.chi: 這封信是去年由我祖父寫的。

examples.eng: The building was destroyed in the earthquake that happened in 1999.
examples.chi: 這棟建築在 1999 年的地震中被摧毀了。

examples.eng: Were all the questions answered correctly by the students?
examples.chi: 所有的問題都被學生們正確回答了嗎？

examples.eng: The new policy was not accepted by the majority of employees.
examples.chi: 新政策沒有被大多數員工接受。

extension.tip: 判斷被動語態的關鍵在於主詞是否為動作的接收者。若主詞執行動作用主動語態（The teacher taught the lesson），若主詞接收動作用被動語態（The lesson was taught by the teacher）。注意過去分詞的正確形式，規則動詞加 -ed，不規則動詞需單獨記憶。

examples.test: 主動：Tom broke the window. / 被動：The window was broken by Tom.
examples.result: → 同一事件不同視角；被動強調窗戶被破，主動強調 Tom 的行為

examples.test: 過去分詞誤用：The house was build last month. (✗)
examples.result: → 正確：The house was built last month. (✓) 不規則動詞 build 的過去分詞為 built

examples.test: 省略 by agent：The book was published in 2020.
examples.result: → 不知道出版者但表達完整；若要強調出版者：by Oxford University Press

extension.note: 單數 was + p.p.，複數 were + p.p.；過去分詞形式影響整句正確性，務必掌握常見不規則動詞。

parts: by the local community hundreds of years ago.
exercises.sentence: The ancient temple was built by the local community hundreds of years ago.
exercises.translation: 這座古老的廟宇是在幾百年前由當地社區建造的。

parts: during the war and later recovered.
exercises.sentence: Many historical documents were hidden during the war and later recovered.
exercises.translation: 許多歷史文件在戰爭期間被隱藏，後來被找回。

parts: to the director because of his outstanding contribution to the film industry.
exercises.sentence: The award was presented to the director because of his outstanding contribution to the film industry.
exercises.translation: 由於導演對電影產業的傑出貢獻，該獎項被頒發給了他。

parts: by the head teacher last week?
exercises.sentence: Were the final exam questions approved by the head teacher last week?
exercises.translation: 期末考試題目上週是否被教務主任批准了？
